results.name: China
results.key_finding: Ethnic Unity and Progress Law in force July 1 is genuine in-force negative own-conduct (codified assimilation + Article 63 extraterritorial diaspora liability + HK last pro-democracy party dissolved). But Amnesty/HRW both frame it as CODIFYING already-documented, already-priced practice; marginal realized-harm delta is two quarter-step docks (EQU 1.5->1.25, EMP 2->1.75) = ~-1.5 composite, below the 5-point threshold. Not pre-adjudication (in force) but sub-threshold. Confirm 19.5; Critical band reinforced; forward trigger = documented enforcement (prosecutions/renditions/Article 63 actions).

results.name: Venezuela
results.key_finding: Earthquake Day 7, toll 1,943 (up from 1,719). The quake is exogenous; only response is scorable and remains mixed - stronger criticism of relief failures (military 'no-show', VP blamed) blocks upgrade; continued broad aid acceptance (20+ teams, US $300M, UNICEF) blocks downgrade. Net sub-threshold. Confirm 18.0; watch ACT/ACC.

results.name: Nigeria
results.key_finding: Lean-season peak double-count screen. 35M IPC Phase 3+ / 15,000 Phase 5 Borno already priced in the Jun 19 band crossing to 18.0. WFP cuts and a formal Phase 5 declaration remain forward triggers. No new development July 1. Confirm 18.0.

results.name: Lebanon
results.key_finding: Post-ceasefire attribution screen. The Jun 28 framework is collapsing (83 killed Jun 30, 100+ Israeli strikes); renewed war harm is Israel's conduct (attribution). Framework's forward-positive (implementation) did not materialize - no upgrade. Hezbollah's rejection is non-state conduct. No new Lebanese own-conduct. Confirm 17.2; watch BND/ACT.

results.name: UnitedHealth Group
results.key_finding: Pre-adjudication screen. DOJ criminal probe widening to Optum Rx/physician reimbursement + civil MA-inflation probe are investigations, not convictions. Jun 23 DOJ takedown is sector context, not entity-named. Near-floor 10.2 already prices the Senate 'aggressively gaming' finding. Confirm 10.2; watch ACC/INT (DOJ outcome, Q3 review, Jul 29 earnings).

results.name: California
results.key_finding: FIRST FORMAL BASELINE. Never previously assessed. Within-window evidence net mildly positive and consistent with Exemplary: new Housing & Homelessness Agency (Jul 1), SB 243 companion-chatbot safety law, ADS anti-discrimination rules; tempered by 161,548 homeless (27.9% US, but -4% YoY) and LA protest policing (tear gas/batons). None clears the 5-point threshold from 87.7. Composite reconstructs cleanly (base 79.7 + premium 8.0). Confirm 87.7, rank 5; baseline established. Watch ACC/EQU/ACT.

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: Floor reinforced. Lebanon strikes (100+ since Jun 28 midnight) and Gaza aid curbs (77% food insecure, 37 orgs banned, 992+ killed since ceasefire) are Israel's own negative conduct - reinforce but cannot lower a floor score. No positive own-conduct (no withdrawal/restored access). Confirm 0.0; watch ACT/ACC.

results.name: Palestine
results.key_finding: Attribution screen. The Gaza food crisis, aid-truck collapse (4,200->590/wk), access obstruction, and 37-org ban are Israel's conduct (blockade), scored against Israel - not Palestine's own conduct. Surfaced on negative externally-caused evidence: cannot generate a Palestine downgrade; no new positive Palestinian own-conduct blocks an upgrade. Confirm 25.0; watch ACT/EQU.

results.name: Anthropic
results.key_finding: Resolved-arc net-neutral screen. The Jun 12 Commerce Dept ban on Fable 5/Mythos 5 (cyber-capability concern) -> Jun 26-27 clearance -> Jun 30 full lift opened and closed within window. The ban was an exogenous government action, not an Anthropic harm event; models were cleared, not found harmful (no downgrade); the lift restores status quo (no upgrade). Net neutral. WH 30-day vetting framework is a forward factor. Confirm 59.1; watch SYS/BND.

results.name: Kuwait
results.key_finding: Attribution/directionality screen. Doha talks + Hormuz MOU de-escalation; no new Iranian attack on Kuwait. Prior Iranian strikes are Iran's conduct (attribution). Kuwait's own conduct (effective defense, no fatalities, no internal crackdown) is competent civilian protection consistent with band - not strong countervailing compassion. Surfaced on negative theater: no upgrade; no new own-harm: no downgrade. Confirm 25.0; watch EQU (bidoon/migrants)/ACT.

results.name: Burkina Faso
results.key_finding: Double-count + calibration screen. 52.8M Sahel food insecurity + 2.1M IDPs + 3.5M besieged + April 118-NGO dissolution continue the already-priced (Jun 1 reweighted) arc; scan notes no new development July 1. JNIM siege harm is non-state. Open Sahel-band calibration (Mali 12.5 vs BF 6.3) remains a coordinator-level flag-for-review, not an assessor one-off (3e-bis(5)). Confirm 6.3.

results.name: Democratic Republic of Congo
results.key_finding: Near-floor compounding screen. Fastest-growing-ever Ebola outbreak now in a 4th province (Haut-Uele, Jun 29) with international spread (France case Jun 24, US evac); 1,307+ cases/377+ deaths. M23 harm attributed to Rwanda-backed forces (non-state/external); DRC's own weak Ebola response reinforces the near-floor but compounds already-priced crises - no new threshold. Confirm 2.3; watch ACT/AWR.

results.name: Bahrain
results.key_finding: Attribution screen. Iranian drone strikes on Bahrain (Amnesty war-crimes research) are Iran's conduct, scored against Iran - not Bahrain's. Bahrain's 9.4 already prices its OWN repression (2011 legacy, political prisoners, citizenship-stripping, Shia-majority discrimination). Surfaced on negative theater: no upgrade; no new own-conduct: no downgrade. Confirm 9.4; watch EQU/ACC.

results.name: Iran
results.key_finding: Double-count + near-floor screen. Executions 784+ YTD (37-year high) and protester crackdown ARE Iran's own conduct (correctly scored against Iran), but 784+ is the SAME figure priced in June; re-scoring double-counts. Gulf strikes targeted military bases with limited civilian casualties - not NEW mass deliberate harm clearing the 5-point threshold toward the floor. Confirm 2.5; watch ACC/EQU.

results.name: Russia
results.key_finding: Floor reinforced. Deliberate targeting of city centers/energy infrastructure (22+ civilians killed single night; 2026 casualty rate 20% higher than 2025; 62,716 total OHCHR casualties) is Russia's own negative conduct - reinforces but cannot lower a floor score. Continuation of an already-priced pattern. Confirm 0.0; watch ACT/ACC.

false_positives_screened.screened: The Ethnic Unity and Progress Law (in force Jul 1) is genuine in-force negative own-conduct - NOT pre-adjudication. But Amnesty and HRW both characterize it as CODIFYING already-documented, already-priced assimilation/transnational-repression practice ('existing practices now embedded in national law'). No NEW enforcement action (prosecutions/renditions/family detentions/Article 63 actions) is documented on day one. Defensible marginal dock is two quarter-steps (EQU 1.5->1.25, EMP 2->1.75) = ~-1.5 composite, below the 5-point threshold (precedent: single quarter-step ~0.8pt). Confirm 19.5; Critical band reinforced; forward trigger logged.

First formal baseline (never assessed). Within-window positives (new Housing & Homelessness Agency Jul 1, SB 243 AI-safety law, ADS anti-discrimination rules) support Exemplary but are consistent with 87.7 - not a >=5pt upgrade. Homelessness caseload is chronic/already-priced (EQU 4.0, ACC 3.5); the -4% YoY is modest. LA protest policing is partly municipal and a single incident - logged as ACC watch, does not clear threshold. Confirm 87.7.

The Jun 12-30 model ban->clearance->lift arc was a government action (Commerce Dept), not an Anthropic harm event. Models were cleared (not found harmful) so absence of adverse finding blocks a downgrade; the lift restores status quo so it is not new positive own-conduct (no upgrade). Anthropic's safety-guardrail posture is already priced in the 2026-05-29 INT/SYS uplift. WH 30-day vetting framework is a forward factor. Net neutral. Confirm 59.1.

The earthquake is a natural disaster (exogenous, not own-conduct). Only response is scorable and remains mixed: stronger relief-failure criticism (directionality blocks upgrade) vs continued broad aid acceptance (blocks downgrade). Rising toll reflects scale + disclosure, not a new government harm act. Net sub-threshold. Confirm 18.0.

35M Phase 3+ / 15,000 Phase 5 Borno already priced in the Jun 19 band crossing to 18.0; re-scoring double-counts. WFP cuts + Phase 5 declaration are forward triggers. No new development July 1. Confirm 18.0.

Framework collapse means the forward-positive (implementation) did not materialize - no upgrade on unrealized promise. Renewed war harm is Israel's conduct (attribution). Hezbollah's rejection is non-state conduct. No new Lebanese own-conduct; absence of new own-harm is not positive evidence. Confirm 17.2.

DOJ criminal/civil probes (now widened to Optum Rx) are investigations, not convictions (not yet decided in court). Jun 23 takedown is sector context, not entity-named. Near-floor 10.2 already prices the Senate 'aggressively gaming' finding. Confirm 10.2.
Lebanon strikes + Gaza aid curbs are negative own-conduct reinforcing but cannot lower a floor (0.0). No withdrawal/restored access = no positive own-conduct for an upgrade. Confirm 0.0.

The Gaza food crisis, aid-truck collapse, access obstruction, and 37-org ban are Israel's conduct (scored against Israel), not Palestine's own conduct. Surfaced on externally-caused negative evidence: cannot generate a Palestine downgrade; no new positive Palestinian own-conduct blocks an upgrade. Confirm 25.0.

Iranian strikes ON the Gulf states are Iran's conduct (scored against Iran), not the states' own conduct. Each scored on OWN conduct - competent civilian protection (Kuwait) / already-priced repression (Bahrain). Surfaced on negative theater: no upgrade; no new own-harm: no downgrade. Kuwait 25.0, Bahrain 9.4 confirmed.

52.8M Sahel food insecurity + IDP/siege totals + April NGO dissolution continue the already-priced (Jun 1 reweighted) arc; no new development July 1. JNIM siege harm is non-state. Open Sahel-band calibration (Mali 12.5 vs BF 6.3) is a coordinator-level flag-for-review, not an assessor one-off. Confirm 6.3.

M23 mass-killing harm attributed to Rwanda-backed forces. DRC's own weak Ebola response (now 4th province + international spread) reinforces the near-floor but compounds already-priced crises; no new threshold. Confirm 2.3.

784+ executions is Iran's own conduct (correctly scored) but is the SAME figure priced in June; re-scoring double-counts. Gulf strikes hit military bases with limited civilian casualties - not NEW mass deliberate harm clearing the 5-point threshold toward the floor. Confirm 2.5.

Deliberate civilian/energy-infrastructure targeting is Russia's own negative conduct reinforcing but cannot lower a floor (0.0). Escalating casualty rate continues an already-priced pattern. Confirm 0.0.

sahel_calibration_status: OPEN - coordinator-level Sahel-band reweight review carried forward (Mali 12.5 vs Burkina Faso 6.3). Burkina Faso confirmed at 6.3; no assessor one-off (3e-bis(5)).

math_hygiene.note: validate-indexes.mjs run: 13870 checks passed, 0 errors, 131 warnings (none on the 15 assessed entities). All 15 assessed at live-index baselines read from countries.json, us-states.json (California 87.7/rank5 reconstructs: base 79.7 + integration premium 8.0 = 87.7), fortune-500.json (UnitedHealth 10.2/rank445) and ai-labs.json (Anthropic 59.1/rank13). China 19.5 reconstructs (research view -1.5 sub-threshold, not applied). All published deltas 0.0; no math-hygiene flags.

forward_triggers_logged: China: documented enforcement under the Ethnic Unity and Progress Law - prosecutions, forced renditions, family detentions of diaspora, or a first Article 63 extraterritorial action = NEW realized harm scorable toward an EQU/BND dock.

California: state-sanctioned protest-suppression pattern or reversal of the homelessness-reduction trend = ACC/EQU pressure; verified homelessness-reduction outcomes from the new agency = EQU/ACT upgrade support.

Anthropic: a model deployed and found to bypass safety guardrails in the wild, or a safety-pledge abandonment under the vetting framework = SYS/INT downgrade; a documented costly safety refusal under the framework = cost-of-conscience upgrade support.
Venezuela: documented deliberate obstruction of relief or falsified casualty data = downgrade; effective equitable relief scale-up = upgrade.
Nigeria: realized WFP cuts plus a formal IPC Phase 5 famine declaration in Borno with documented aid obstruction.
Lebanon: an implemented civilian-protecting ceasefire with the Lebanese state extending governance/relief = upgrade.
UnitedHealth: a DOJ complaint, indictment, ruling, settlement, or admitted findings would be scorable (ACC/INT).
Israel: durable verified ceasefire with unobstructed aid access, 37-org ban reversed, and withdrawal = upgrade.
Palestine: documented aid diversion/abuses by Palestinian authorities = downgrade; effective equitable governance/relief under constraint = upgrade.
Kuwait/Bahrain: documented internal crackdown / discriminatory denial of emergency protection = downgrade; durable rights expansion / political-prisoner release = upgrade.
Burkina Faso: intensified state-perpetrated violence or new siege expansion = downgrade; durable civilian-protection/aid-access expansion and NGO-dissolution reversal = upgrade.
DRC: collapse or deliberate obstruction of the Ebola response = downgrade; competent verified scale-up with containment = upgrade.
Iran: a documented new mass-casualty deliberate-harm event or a further sharp execution escalation.
Russia: a verified durable ceasefire with cessation of civilian targeting and reversal of domestic repression = upgrade.
